concerns.text: FR-002 (ICA) and SC-004 (70% retention) are covered, but the Spec Edge Case 'exclude subjects with >50% rejected epochs' lacks a task to actually EXCLUDE them from the final dataset. T018 only logs the count. Without an exclusion task, the model may train on biased data.

Plan Phase 3 explicitly requires 'Stimulus Control: Regress out stimulus complexity metrics'. No task in Phase 4 (T023-T029) or elsewhere implements this regression or flagging. This leaves a key plan component unaddressed.

FR-005/FR-006 require handling [deferred] subject splits. T033 implements fixed 5-fold CV but lacks a task to calculate the dynamic split size or implement the logic to honor the [deferred] constraint before training.

Plan Phase 4 requires 'Permutation testing' for global significance. T037 mentions it, but T030-T032 (tests) and T033-T040 (impl) focus on Ridge/Bonferroni. There is no explicit task to implement the permutation test logic itself, only to test it or compare against baseline.

T009 creates a 'skeleton' for preprocess.py, while T013-T019 implement the logic in the same file later. This splits a single FR (FR-001/FR-002) across a placeholder and implementation, risking duplication or the skeleton never being updated.

T046 updates state/ YAML at the end. Constitution Principle V requires updates on *every* artifact change. A single end-task does not enforce the continuous versioning discipline required for intermediate changes.
